packageRules.description: Block the modernc.org/libc v1->v2 'major' jump. libc is an indirect dependency whose version is pinned by modernc.org/sqlite (v1 line). The v2 module path (modernc.org/libc/v2) is a separate, dormant line (v2.1.30, frozen 2024-02) that nothing in the build graph imports; Renovate's 'major' PR only adds a phantom require that go mod tidy strips. Let sqlite drive libc. v1 minor/patch updates still flow.
